title: Sarcophagus

'''Sarcophagus''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] that orbited the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Sacorria]], and served as a massive graveyard for the planet's [[Death/Legends|deceased]] inhabitants. The Sacorrians began using the moon as a [[Burial/Legends|burial]] ground shortly after the development of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] flight; before that, it was simply known as "the moon." It was settled since at least the founding day of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]], as a native of the moon named [[Cope Shykrill]] served as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] five hundred [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[First Great Schism]].

Offworlders were permitted to visit Sarcophagus, but none were interred there. Used by all three of Sacorria's [[Species/Legends|species]], Sarcophagus housed a diverse collection of tombs, grave sites, and mausoleums on its surface, as well as catacombs and burial caves underground. Orbital [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] provided transportation to and from Sacorria, and the [[Central Databank]] provided locations for the vast number of plots.

Sacorrians remained superstitious about Sarcophagus. Looking up into the night sky and seeing the full moon stirred up thoughts of death and calamity. By tradition, and the decree of the [[Sacorrian Triad|Triad]], pointing a telescope at Sarcophagus was illegal because it was seen as disrespectful of the dead.

{{Moon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
A real-world [[Wikipedia:sarcophagus|sarcophagus]] was a container for [[Wikipedia:mummy|mummified]] bodies in antiquity.
